compilerPrompt.title: Final AI Report
compilerPrompt.purpose: Have an AI agent synthesize the five gate answers into the investment thesis, market misunderstanding, consolidated risks, portfolio fit notes, and final decision.

gates.title: Fundamental Quality Screen
gates.purpose: Confirm the company clears basic revenue, cash flow, and balance sheet requirements before deeper analysis.
questions: Which fiscal year-end and reporting currency should be used?
Should acquisitions be adjusted out of revenue growth?
Should stock-based compensation be deducted from free cash flow quality?

gates.title: The Rule of 40
gates.purpose: Confirm growth plus free cash flow clears the quality bar.
questions: Should growth use trailing twelve months, latest fiscal year, or 3-year CAGR?
Which peer group is the fairest comparison?
Are there major acquisitions or divestitures that distort growth?

gates.title: The Moat Test
gates.purpose: Decide whether growth is protected or easy to copy.
questions: Which competitor set should be used for moat comparison?
Are margins structurally high or temporarily boosted by a cycle?
Which moat category is most likely to weaken first?

gates.title: The CEO Filter
gates.purpose: Test whether leadership deserves long-term trust.
questions: Should founder status be weighted more heavily than professional management quality?
What ownership threshold counts as meaningful skin in the game?
Which past promises should be used to measure delivery?

gates.title: Valuation
gates.purpose: Make sure the bear case is still attractive.
questions: Which discount rate and terminal growth assumptions are acceptable?
Should stock-based compensation be treated as a real cost in valuation?
What minimum bear-case return is required before investing?
